license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xswfnfe
title: Mammalian Cell Nucleus Staining
author: Kenneth Schackart

steps_raw.instruction: Using micropipette, remove cell culture media from each well.
Wash each well twice with 100 µL DPBS.
Add 100 µL NucBlue™ solution to each well.
Cover with aluminum foil. The aluminum foil is simply to prevent photobleaching of the fluorescent dye.
